description: Dest pipeline shared by m_26_14-score-rollup (per-component) and m_26_14-score-rollup-enterprise transforms (Stage 2). Receives a pivot aggregation doc with fields: n (entity count), reporting (sum score_inventory), covered (sum score_coverage), min_horizon (min effective_horizon_days), and either asset.component (component rollup) or run_id='engine' (enterprise rollup). Enriches config thresholds, runs level_from_pct for inventory/coverage and retention_level for retention (same math as score.py with single-axis empirical horizon), and emits a combined element:'rollup' doc. Deterministic _id = 'rollup::<component|_enterprise>' so each run upserts.

enrich.description: Bring in config thresholds for all ladders

script.description: Compute inventory/coverage/retention levels and shape rollup doc
script.source: def th = ctx._cfg?.thresholds; if (th == null) { th = ['inventory': ['l1':70,'l2':80,'l3':90,'l4':95], 'coverage': ['l1':50,'l2':80,'l3':90,'l4':95], 'retention': ['l1_retrievable_days':180,'l2_retrievable_days':365,'l3_searchable_days':90,'l3_retrievable_days':365,'l4_searchable_days':180,'l4_retrievable_days':365]]; } long n = ctx.n != null ? (long)ctx.n : 0L; long reporting = ctx.reporting != null ? (long)ctx.reporting : 0L; long covered = ctx.covered != null ? (long)ctx.covered : 0L; double minHorizon = ctx.min_horizon != null ? (double)ctx.min_horizon : 0.0; double ipct = n > 0 ? (100.0 * reporting / n) : 0.0; double cpct = n > 0 ? (100.0 * covered / n) : 0.0; def invTh = th.inventory; int invLevel = 0; for (int lvl = 4; lvl >= 1; lvl--) { if (ipct >= (double)invTh['l'+lvl]) { invLevel = lvl; break; } } def covTh = th.coverage; int covLevel = 0; for (int lvl = 4; lvl >= 1; lvl--) { if (cpct >= (double)covTh['l'+lvl]) { covLevel = lvl; break; } } def retTh = th.retention; int retLevel = 0; if (minHorizon >= (double)retTh.l4_searchable_days && minHorizon >= (double)retTh.l4_retrievable_days) retLevel = 4; else if (minHorizon >= (double)retTh.l3_searchable_days && minHorizon >= (double)retTh.l3_retrievable_days) retLevel = 3; else if (minHorizon >= (double)retTh.l2_retrievable_days) retLevel = 2; else if (minHorizon >= (double)retTh.l1_retrievable_days) retLevel = 1; String comp = null; if (ctx.asset instanceof Map && ((Map)ctx.asset).get('component') != null) comp = ((Map)ctx.asset).get('component').toString(); else if (ctx.get('asset.component') != null) comp = ctx.get('asset.component').toString(); ctx.remove('asset.component'); boolean isEnterprise = (comp == null); String rollupKey = isEnterprise ? '_enterprise' : comp; ctx._id = 'rollup::' + rollupKey; ctx.element = 'rollup'; ctx.run_id = 'engine'; if (isEnterprise) { ctx.asset = ['id': '_rollup']; } else { ctx.asset = ['id': '_rollup', 'component': comp]; } ctx.score_inventory = (int)invLevel; ctx.score_coverage = (int)covLevel; ctx.score_retention = (int)retLevel; ctx.evidence = ['n': n, 'reporting': reporting, 'covered': covered, 'inventory_pct': Math.round(ipct * 10) / 10.0, 'coverage_pct': Math.round(cpct * 10) / 10.0, 'min_effective_horizon_days': minHorizon, 'basis_inventory': 'pct_reporting', 'basis_coverage': 'pct_with_searchable_logs', 'basis_retention': 'empirical_min_horizon', 'denominator': 'store_canonical_entities', 'store_authoritative': true]; ctx.remove('_cfg'); ctx.remove('config_key'); ctx.remove('n'); ctx.remove('reporting'); ctx.remove('covered'); ctx.remove('min_horizon');
